command:
python -c 
import urllib.request, os, sys

url = 'http://www.cell.com/article/S0896627316001069/pdf'
out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; ResearchBot/1.0; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
}

req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
        data = resp.read()
        ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
        print(f'Content-Type: {ct}')
        print(f'Size: {len(data)} bytes')
        if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
            with open(out, 'wb') as f:
                f.write(data)
            print('Saved successfully')
        else:
            print('Not a PDF, first 200 bytes:', data[:200])
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
